% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

6. ? [X0] : (mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico) & visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~? [X0] : (mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico) & visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ! [X0,X1] : (~donated(X1) | (~mine_in(X1,X0) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas))) [ennf transformation 5]
9. ! [X0,X1] : (~donated(X1) | ~mine_in(X1,X0) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas)) [flattening 8]
10. ! [X0] : (~mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico) | ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
11. mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) | mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) [cnf transformation 1]
12. visited(juan_de_onate,picuris) [cnf transformation 2]
13. mine_in(harding_pegmatite,picuris) [cnf transformation 3]
14. donated(harding_pegmatite) [cnf transformation 4]
15. ~mine_in(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas) [cnf transformation 9]
16. ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico) [cnf transformation 10]
18. 1 <=> mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) [avatar definition]
20. mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) <- (1) [avatar component clause 18]
22. 2 <=> mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) [avatar definition]
24. mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) <- (2) [avatar component clause 22]
25. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 11,22,18]
26. ~mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) [resolution 12,16]
27. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 26,24]
28. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 27]
29. ~donated(harding_pegmatite) | ~mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) [resolution 15,13]
30. ~mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) [forward subsumption resolution 29,14]
31. $false <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 30,20]
32. ~1 [avatar contradiction clause 31]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 25]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 28]
s3. ~1 [sat_conversion 32]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
33. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]

% Termination reason: Refutation
